description: Update robots.ts to disallow /api/ and /_next/static paths, and update sitemap.ts to add missing pages (/neighborhood-explorer, /solar-roi/analyze). These are the foundational crawling/indexing files.
steps: Edit app/robots.ts to add disallow rules for '/api/' and '/_next/static/' while keeping the existing allow '/' and disallow '/private/' rules. Keep the sitemap reference.

Edit app/sitemap.ts to add the /neighborhood-explorer page with priority 0.8 and changeFrequency 'monthly' in the static pages or additional pages section. Also add /solar-roi/analyze with priority 0.8.
acceptance_criteria: robots.ts exports a function returning rules with disallow array including '/api/', '/_next/static/', and '/private/'
sitemap.ts includes entries for /neighborhood-explorer and /solar-roi/analyze URLs
npm run build succeeds without errors
verification: Run: cd /projects/sandbox/cost-smart && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -20
findings: Build succeeded cleanly. robots.ts now disallows /api/, /_next/static/, /private/. sitemap.ts now includes /neighborhood-explorer and /solar-roi/analyze entries.
